## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API, config, or deploy)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Template pack / eval baseline
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (Go + Python unit tests)
- [ ] If I changed retrieval, config, eval, or KB data: `make eval-retrieval-ci` passes (or I explain why not)
- [ ] I updated documentation for API, config, or deploy changes
- [ ] I did not commit secrets (`.env`, API keys, tokens)
- [ ] Breaking changes are noted in CHANGELOG.md (Unreleased section)
